chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Misc. Application No.D-365 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 06.09.2022. Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Kalhoro advocate for the applicant. Mr. Abdul Waheed Bijarani Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Rashid Raees advocate for respondents No.6 & 7. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Applicant registered FIR at P.S. Hali Road bearing Crime No.72/2014 reporting death of her daughter by respondents who include her husband and his parents through poison. Investigation followed and I.O. finding no evidence medical or otherwise disposed of the case under “C” Class and submitted such report before Magistrate who vide impugned order has endorsed the same and disposed of the case as such which has been challenged by the applicant. We have gone through the material available on record and heard the parties. Learned APG has confirmed that in the post- mortem report death of the deceased as unnatural is not determined. And Visceras of deceased were sent to detect any poisonous substance, but the report has come in negative. The complainant is not an eye witness of the incident and even on the body of deceased there was no mark of violence. As against this, no material has been pointed out cogent enough to justify trial of the respondents against charge of murder. We, therefore, find the impugned order based on correct appreciation of material and maintain the same. Consequently, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
